case_title: TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION VS. PREMIER AUTO BODY et al

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT PREMIER AUTO BODY ARNOLD, DARREN VOLK, LEE A DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          APR-12-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-11-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAR-15-2002

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $258.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT PREMIER AUTO BODY ARNOLD, DARREN VOLK, LEE A

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PREMIER AUTO BODY ARNOLD, DARREN VOLK, LEE A $11,797.58 PRINCIPAL, $1,525.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $248.85 INTEREST, $258.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $13,829.43, TOTAL JUDGMENT IS $13829.43, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
STATUS CONFERENCE OF APR-12-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT ENTERED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
